## Analyzers (1)

### [Patrowl_GetReport v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Patrowl/Patrowl_GetReport.json)
Get the current Patrowl report for a fdqn, a domain or an IP address.

- **Author:** Nicolas Mattiocco
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `fqdn`, `domain`, `ip`
